title: Exhaustion Fatigue - (Tiredness)
body:
Exhaustion Fatigue

Adds Exhaustion/Tiredness

Every Day Without Sleep you get more tired making certain actions harder.

There are 5 stages of Exhaustion

 

Day 1: A Simple Warning to sleep

Day 2: Minor Debuffs

Day 3: Disable Sprinting and major debuffs

Day 4: Attacking Wont Work And Even More Major Debuffs

Day 5: Eventually you will die from Exhaustion

--

Fabric Or Forge?

-

As of now the mod is forge only.

A Fabric Version is planned

-

Any Issues?

Please leave a comment.
